title: Building Blocks
description: A simple yet thorough modpack designed with mods in mind for map makers or world editors.
body:
This modpack contains optimization mods, Litematica, WorldEdit, and Axiom. Made for builders.

# Mods
```
  Main
    1. Axiom
    2. Litematica
    3. WorldEdit
  Optimization
    1. Sodium
    2. Lithium
    3. Entity Culling
    4. FerriteCore
    5. ImmediatelyFast
    6. No Chat Reports
    7. Krypton
  Support
    1. Fabric API
    2. Fabric Language Kotlin
    3. Collective
    4. MaLiLib
    5. Text Placeholder API
  Other
    1. Mod Menu
    2. Hide Experimental Warning
```

# Setup
  No setup necessary.

# Disclaimer
  _I do not own or develop any of the mods in this modpack._
